title: clade-parallel Manifest
description: Schema for clade-parallel manifest files (YAML frontmatter in Markdown).

clade_plan_version.description: Version of the clade-parallel manifest format.

tasks.description: Ordered list of agent tasks to execute.

defaults.description: Global default values applied to all tasks. Task-level values always take priority.

concurrency_limits.description: Maximum number of concurrently running tasks per named concurrency group.

on_complete.description: Webhook called after all tasks finish successfully.

on_failure.description: Webhook called when one or more tasks fail.

Defaults.description: Global default values for task fields. All fields are optional.

timeout_sec.description: Default total timeout in seconds for each task.

idle_timeout_sec.description: Default idle timeout in seconds. Task is killed when no output is produced for this duration. Ignored for read_only tasks.

max_retries.description: Default maximum number of additional attempts after the first try.

retry_delay_sec.description: Default base delay in seconds before the first retry.

retry_backoff_factor.description: Default exponential backoff multiplier for retry delays. 1.0 means constant delay.

id.description: Unique identifier for this task within the manifest. Only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores are allowed.

agent.description: Name of the agent that will execute this task (e.g. 'developer', 'tester').

read_only.description: Whether the agent runs in read-only mode. idle_timeout_sec is ignored when true.

prompt.description: Prompt string passed to the agent. Defaults to '/agent-{agent}' if omitted.

timeout_sec.description: Maximum execution time in seconds for this task. Overrides defaults.timeout_sec.

idle_timeout_sec.description: Task is killed when no output is produced for this many seconds. Ignored for read_only tasks. Overrides defaults.idle_timeout_sec.

cwd.description: Working directory for the agent process. Relative paths are resolved against the manifest file's directory.

env.description: Additional environment variables for the agent process. LD_PRELOAD, LD_LIBRARY_PATH, LD_AUDIT, DYLD_INSERT_LIBRARIES, DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH, and PYTHONPATH are blocked for security reasons.

writes.description: Filesystem paths that this task declares it will write. Used for static write-conflict detection across tasks.

depends_on.description: List of task IDs that must complete before this task starts. Duplicates are ignored. Cyclic dependencies are rejected.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of additional attempts after the first try. 0 means no retries. Overrides defaults.max_retries.

retry_delay_sec.description: Base delay in seconds before the first retry. Combined with retry_backoff_factor for exponential backoff. Overrides defaults.retry_delay_sec.

retry_backoff_factor.description: Multiplier applied to the delay for each subsequent retry. 1.0 means constant delay. Overrides defaults.retry_backoff_factor.

concurrency_group.description: Named group for concurrency limiting. Tasks in the same group share a semaphore defined by concurrency_limits. Must have a corresponding entry in concurrency_limits.

webhook_url.description: HTTP or HTTPS URL to POST the notification to. Loopback, link-local, private, and unspecified IP addresses are blocked for SSRF prevention.
